name: docflow
description: DocFlow workflow capture and AI documentation platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run start:dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client run build && npx shx rm -rf server/build && npx shx cp -r client/dist server/build && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.clean: npx shx rm -rf node_modules client/dist client/node_modules server/dist server/node_modules extension/dist extension/node_modules
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix extension install
scripts.lint: npm --prefix server run lint && npm --prefix client run lint
